statement: In every magma, Equation 1126 (`x = y * ((y * (y * z)) * y)`) implies Equation 3061 (`x = (((x * x) * y) * z) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0376
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op y z)) y))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op (op x x) y) z) x)
